ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
title: Valid name and phone fields update customer profile successfully
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
steps: Enter Name: John Smith.
Enter Phone: +1-555-0100.
Click Save.
expected_result: Customer profile is updated successfully. HTTP 200 is returned.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Authorized user successfully updates customer profile
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has permissions to update customer profiles.
steps: Send PUT request to /api/customers/CUST-10045 with update data.
expected_result: HTTP 200 is returned. Response body confirms successful update with updated values.
tags: Unauthorized role attempts to update profile

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Unauthorized user cannot update customer profile
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Unauthorized_User and has no permissions to update customer profiles.
steps: Send PUT request to /api/customers/CUST-10045 with update data.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error message: 'Unauthorized access to update customer profile.'
tags: Unauthorized role attempts to update profile

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Unauthenticated user cannot update customer profile
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
No user is authenticated.
steps: Send PUT request to /api/customers/CUST-10045 with update data.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error message: 'Authentication required to update customer profile.'
tags: Unauthorized role attempts to update profile

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Expired token used to update customer profile
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has valid permissions.
User has an expired authentication token.
steps: Send PUT request to /api/customers/CUST-10045 with expired token and update data.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error message: 'Token has expired.'
tags: Unauthorized role attempts to update profile

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Cross-ownership update attempt fails
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has permissions to update customer profiles.
User is assigned to Customer ID: CUST-10046.
steps: Send PUT request to /api/customers/CUST-10045 with update data.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error message: 'User does not have permission to update this customer profile.'
tags: Unauthorized role attempts to update profile

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Valid profile update triggers sync
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists with current profile data.
steps: Update customer profile with new values.
Click Save.
expected_result: Profile update is reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Profile update failure does not trigger sync
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists with current profile data.
steps: Attempt to update customer profile with invalid data.
Click Save.
expected_result: Profile update fails and does not trigger CRM sync jobs.

correctness.reason: Integration flow evidence is weak; Layer expectations need tightening

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Simultaneous updates cause sync issues
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists with current profile data.
steps: User A updates customer profile.
User B simultaneously updates the same customer profile.
Click Save for both updates.
expected_result: Only one profile update is reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Sync job recovers from failure
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists with current profile data.
steps: Update customer profile with new values.
Simulate a failure in the sync job.
Click Save.
expected_result: Sync job retries and successfully reflects the profile update.

correctness.reason: Integration flow evidence is weak; Layer expectations need tightening
